mapper.insert: INSERT INTO optimization_log (log_id, trigger_time, intersection_id, joint_reward, signal_action_json, route_action_json, status) VALUES (#{logId}, #{triggerTime}, #{intersectionId}, #{jointReward}, #{signalActionJson}, #{routeActionJson}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT log_id, trigger_time, intersection_id, joint_reward, signal_action_json, route_action_json, status FROM optimization_log ORDER BY trigger_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
